notes: [New] AI Chat with Streaming SSE, Markdown and Syntax Highlighting
[New] AI Agents with Backend and UI Support
[New] MCP Server with Tool Calling and Logging Callbacks
[New] RAG with Asset Training, Preview and Search
[New] Semantic Navigation Chat with Tool Calling
[New] LLM Providers: OpenAI, Ollama, Anthropic, Gemini, Azure OpenAI
[New] AI Tools: Web Search, Weather, Finance, Code Interpreter, Image Search
[New] AI-Powered SN Site Summary and Insights
[New] PGVector Store Provider for Vector Stores
[New] Full Migration from Angular to React + TypeScript + Vite + shadcn/ui
[New] Custom Facets with Date-Range, Operators and Drag Ordering
[New] GraphQL Explorer Page with JSON Scalar and Dynamic Fields
[New] SE Cores Management API and UI
[New] Admin Settings: Users, Groups and Roles Management
[New] Weekly Email Reports with AI Insights
[New] Indexing Manager UI with Progress and Auto-Refresh
[New] Currency Field Type with Solr CurrencyFieldType
[New] D2 Diagrams and HTML Previews in Chat
[New] Avatar URL Support with DiceBear Picker and Gravatar
[Improved] Upgraded to Spring Boot 4 and Java 21
[Improved] Async MongoDB Logging and Client Lifecycle
[Improved] AEM Plugin Refactor with Service Layer
[Improved] GitHub Actions Updated to JDK 21 and Node.js 24
[Fixed] Fixed Solr Query Syntax for New Version
[Fixed] Fixed Locale Core Handling and Spellcheck Logic
[Fixed] Fixed Lucene Doc-Values Conflicts and Faceting
[Fixed] Fixed VARCHAR PK Length to 768 for MySQL Compatibility
[Fixed] Fixed Redirect on Logout/Login and 401 Handling
[Fixed] Fixed CSRF Handling for Non-Axios Requests
[Fixed] Fixed Facet Locale Merge Instead of Replace
[Fixed] Fixed Duplicate SN Site Fields Rejection
[Fixed] Fixed Solr Highlighting Attribute Value Handling
[Fixed] Fixed Liquibase Duplicate Column with Idempotent Preconditions
[New] Search returns a list specifying fields
[Improved] Solr - Use commitWithin rather than commit
[New] AEM Connector UI in the Administration Console
[New] Logging for Turing, Indexing, and AEM Connector in Console
[Improved] AEM Connector Service in Spring Boot
[New] Facets and Facet Items using AND and OR
[Improved] AEM connector void index when service is down
[Improved] Git commit hash in version of connectors
[Improved] Auto Complete refactory using State Machine
[New] SN: Search using asterisk when return no results.
[New] Store information about user accesses and searches performed.
[New] Reports - Generates access report, including targeting rules.
[New] Latest searches - Allows you to show the latest searches performed by the user
[New] Spotlight - Show featured content in search terms based on terms. Search positions can be defined.
[New] Multi language - Can have multiple languages ​​for each site, using a language-specific solr core. During indexing you can define which language will be indexed.
[New] Access Logs - Generate turing access log.
[New] Did you mean? - It is now possible to parameterize to show "What did you mean?" showing and correcting the search term automatically.
[New] Merge provider - If two indexing sources are from the same indexed content, you can use the Merge Provider to merge these content, for example: Indexing the same page by WEM and Apache Nutch.
[New] Dynamic Fields: Text, Description and Date.
[Improved] Check Box fields on SN were fixed.
[Improved] Remove newline and trim to concatenated Text.
